summary: Completed frontend testing of WayofDojo new features: 1) Notification system in RPG sidebar with badges for quests, rewards, and streak. 2) TanakaWelcome modal for each section (Techniques, Trophées, Vertus, Ceintures, Profil). All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: TanakaWelcome.tsx component correctly implements 3 variants: 'full' (modal overlay), 'banner' (top banner), 'compact' (small card)
sessionStorage correctly used to prevent modal from reappearing during same session
TANAKA_MESSAGES object contains predefined messages for all sections
JuniorDashboard.tsx correctly implements NOTIFICATIONS section with dynamic badges
All pages (Techniques, Trophées, Vertus, Ceintures, Profil) have TanakaWelcome integrated
Modal has proper close functionality via X button and 'C'est parti' button
data-testid attributes properly implemented for all Tanaka modals
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - using existing test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: 1) NOTIFICATIONS section in sidebar shows quests, rewards, and streak badges dynamically. 2) TanakaWelcome modal appears on first visit to each section and uses sessionStorage to prevent reappearing. Modal can be closed via X button or 'C'est parti' button.

login_junior_user.details: gratuit@wayofdojo.com successfully logs in and redirects to /fr/aikido/dojo

notifications_section.details: NOTIFICATIONS section visible in sidebar with '6 nouvelles' badge

notif_quests.details: '6 quêtes disponibles' with '+85 XP à gagner' - data-testid='notif-quests'

notif_reward.details: 'Nouveau badge débloqué !' with 'Réclamer ta récompense' - data-testid='notif-reward'

notif_streak.details: '🔥 Série de 3 jours !' with 'Continue comme ça !' - data-testid='notif-streak'

tanaka_welcome_techniques.details: Modal appears with personalized message about techniques library
tanaka_welcome_techniques.modal_content: Voici la bibliothèque des techniques ! Plus de 200 mouvements t'attendent...

buttons.cest_parti: PASS - 'C'est parti ! 🚀' button present and closes modal

tanaka_welcome_techniques.session_storage: PASS - Modal does not reappear after reload

tanaka_welcome_trophees.details: Modal appears with personalized message about trophies
tanaka_welcome_trophees.modal_content: Voici ta vitrine de récompenses ! Chaque badge représente un accomplissement...

tanaka_welcome_vertus.details: Modal appears with personalized message about 7 Virtues of Budo
tanaka_welcome_vertus.modal_content: Les 7 Vertus du Budo sont le cœur de notre pratique. Respect, Courage, Maîtrise...

tanaka_welcome_ceintures.details: Modal appears with personalized message about belt progression
tanaka_welcome_ceintures.modal_content: La progression par les ceintures symbolise ton évolution. Du blanc au noir...

tanaka_welcome_profil.details: Modal appears with personalized message about profile
tanaka_welcome_profil.modal_content: Voici ton espace personnel ! Tu peux y voir ta progression, tes statistiques...

session_storage_persistence.details: Modal does not reappear after page reload (sessionStorage working)
